themes.reasoning_notes: Mana creature in artifact form; taps for green equal to its power, scaling from 1 to 3 mana via prototype/full cast.
Artifact creature that naturally slots into artifact-matter shells, though its text is mainly a mana ability.
Repeatable mana source; prototype lets it come down on turn three, and its tap ability scales with its power from 1 to 3 green.
Artifact creature body gives it incidental artifact-matter synergy, but the card's main deckbuilding pull is mana production.
